player.name: Crawler
player.class_description: Survived printer drivers, password resets, and now whatever this is.
player.special_ability: Have You Tried Rebooting It: balanced stats with extra luck.

inventory.name: Stapler of Minor Regret
inventory.flavor: Mostly for paperwork. Occasionally for goblins.

inventory.name: Expired Energy Drink
inventory.flavor: It tastes like battery acid got a marketing degree.

theme.name: Parking Garage Depths of Zone F
theme.description: A spiraling garage where every level is F, the ticket machine is hungry, and headlights follow from below.

room_0.title: Arrival Platform
room_0.description: You arrive on Floor 1. The broadcast lights ignite over Parking Garage Depths of Zone F.

room_1.title: Overbooked Customer Engagement Zone
room_1.description: Something hostile is contractually obligated to be here.

enemies.name: Doorbell Drone
enemies.flavor: It records everything, including your declining confidence.

room_2.title: Condemned Questionable Prize Closet
room_2.description: A prize container hums with poor judgment and possible value.

loot.name: Mascot Whistle
loot.flavor: Only some of the things that answer are mascots.

room_3.title: Overbooked Liability Hallway
room_3.description: The room is quiet in the way lawsuits are quiet before discovery.

room_4.title: Sanitized Contestant Services Desk
room_4.description: Someone who has survived too long waits under a broken camera drone.

event.name: Quarter Slot Oracle
outcomes: A coin slot predicts your future in exact change.
The oracle demands quarters and dispenses a prophecy about stains.
event.chosen_text: A coin slot predicts your future in exact change.

room_5.title: Premium Brand Activation Chamber
room_5.description: A corporate crate sits beneath a glowing sign that says YOU'RE WELCOME.

loot.name: Potluck Casserole Square
loot.flavor: Nobody knows who brought it. Everybody respects it.

loot.name: Lanyard Whip
loot.flavor: The plastic sleeve leaves a mark.

room_6.title: Unauthorized Customer Engagement Zone
room_6.description: Something hostile is contractually obligated to be here.

enemies.name: Cosplay Hydra
enemies.flavor: Every head insists it is the canon version.

room_7.title: Haunted Predatory Retail Kiosk
room_7.description: A kiosk unfolds from the wall, already calculating your desperation markup.

loot.name: Stapler of Minor Regret
loot.flavor: Mostly for paperwork. Occasionally for goblins.

loot.name: Clipboard Cleaver
loot.flavor: Cuts, clips, and requests your insurance card.

loot.name: Detention Slip Fan
loot.flavor: A thousand minor infractions, folded into violence.

event.name: Parking Validation Desk
outcomes: The attendant validates purchases, parking, and mild panic.
A tiny bell summons commerce from the concrete dark.
event.chosen_text: A tiny bell summons commerce from the concrete dark.

room_8.title: Discount Unlicensed Break Room
room_8.description: A damaged bench, lukewarm vending machine, and suspicious calm invite you to breathe.

room_9.title: Middle Management Arena
room_9.description: A smaller arena opens. The audience still screams like this counts for their dental plan.

enemies.name: Mini-Boss Doorbell Drone
enemies.flavor: It records everything, including your declining confidence.

loot.name: Stapler of Minor Regret
loot.flavor: Mostly for paperwork. Occasionally for goblins.

room_10.title: Discount Liability Hallway
room_10.description: The room is quiet in the way lawsuits are quiet before discovery.

trap.name: Mandatory Meeting Circle
trap.flavor: You lose minutes of your life and possibly blood.

room_11.title: Sanitized Questionable Prize Closet
room_11.description: A prize container hums with poor judgment and possible value.

loot.name: Lanyard Whip
loot.flavor: The plastic sleeve leaves a mark.

room_12.title: Executive Access Gate
room_12.description: A reinforced gate demands confidence, clearance, or a terrible idea.

room_13.title: Final Performance Arena
room_13.description: The arena opens wide. The audience signal spikes.

room_14.title: Emergency Exit-ish Door
room_14.description: A door out. Probably. The label has been corrected with marker six times.

boss.name: Zone F Attendant
boss.flavor: It knows where you parked. It will never tell you.

lore.title: Emergency Dungeon Broadcast
lore.intro: The dungeon's narration system coughs, sparks, and begins reading from a laminated card.
lore.description: This floor smells like danger, mildew, and unpaid overtime.
lore.warning: Try not to die. It creates scheduling issues.
lore.generation_error: HTTPConnectionPool(host='127.0.0.1', port=11434): Read timed out. (read timeout=90)
lore.boss_intro:
"Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the Parking Garage Depths of Zone F! Where the dreams go to die, and the parking fees are to kill... your soul. And now, put your hands together for the one being who's been tasked with making sure you don't escape this endless cycle of despair: the illustrious, the incomparable, the unutterably tragic... Zone F Attendant!

This mastermind of malaise has spent eons perfecting the art of monotony, of crushing hope, and of collecting parking tickets. With an arsenal of sass, sarcasm, and bureaucratic red tape, they'll stop at nothing to ensure your stay in Zone F is as long as possible.

So, brave adventurer, if you think you can outrun the abyssal depths of paperwork, outsmart the despairing gaze of our hero, or outlast the oppressive silence of this parking garage... Well, we just can't wait to see you try. Let's get this over with. Zone F Attendant, put your ticket-stamping skills on display!"
lore.sponsor_message: "Attention contestants! Are you ready to take on the treacherous tunnels of 'Dungeon Delirium'? Look no further than FloorPal Navigation's Maps That Admit Nothing! Our maps are expertly crafted to show you exactly where to go... or maybe they'll just, uh, 'suggest' a general direction. Either way, it's fun for everyone (except the contestants who end up in the pit of despair)! Thanks to FloorPal Navigation, contestants will experience even more excitement, confusion, and possible demise. It's a winning combination!"
